metadata.chunk_id: Phishing blijkt populaire vorm van cybercriminaliteit__c4-paragraph__0003
metadata.source_slug: Phishing blijkt populaire vorm van cybercriminaliteit
metadata.source_title: Phishing proves a popular form of cybercrime

id: Phishing blijkt populaire vorm van cybercriminaliteit__c4-paragraph__0004
text: Phishing is a popular method for cybercriminals to gain access to companies, and entrepreneurs fear it. Attackers send messages that prompt the recipient to take an action that later turns out to be harmful. Attacks are becoming more targeted and more sophisticated.

metadata.chunk_id: Phishing blijkt populaire vorm van cybercriminaliteit__c4-paragraph__0004
metadata.source_slug: Phishing blijkt populaire vorm van cybercriminaliteit
metadata.source_title: Phishing proves a popular form of cybercrime

id: Phishing blijkt populaire vorm van cybercriminaliteit__c4-paragraph__0005
text: [Phishing](https://www.abnamro.nl/nl/zakelijk/insights/cybersecurity/wat-is-phishing.html) is the most reported type across all company sizes, according to a survey by ABN AMRO and research agency MWM2 among 895 organisations. In 2023, well over half of companies faced phishing emails or texts. These messages tempt the recipient to open a link that triggers an automatic download of malicious software, or to visit a fake login page where data are shared with malicious third parties.

metadata.chunk_id: Phishing blijkt populaire vorm van cybercriminaliteit__c4-paragraph__0005
metadata.source_slug: Phishing blijkt populaire vorm van cybercriminaliteit
metadata.source_title: Phishing proves a popular form of cybercrime

id: Phishing blijkt populaire vorm van cybercriminaliteit__c4-paragraph__0006
text: CEO fraud is a specific form of phishing, also known as “whaling”. Fraudsters pose as the CEO or a senior manager and approach employees in their name. The channels range from email to WhatsApp and even phone calls. These are usually urgent requests to transfer money, pay invoices or provide sensitive information. The attackers have often already done careful research. First to find the right contact details, and also to imitate the manager’s communication style. No fewer than 33 per cent of large-company respondents faced such an attack last year.

metadata.chunk_id: Phishing blijkt populaire vorm van cybercriminaliteit__c4-paragraph__0006
metadata.source_slug: Phishing blijkt populaire vorm van cybercriminaliteit
metadata.source_title: Phishing proves a popular form of cybercrime

id: Phishing blijkt populaire vorm van cybercriminaliteit__c4-paragraph__0007

metadata.chunk_id: Phishing blijkt populaire vorm van cybercriminaliteit__c4-paragraph__0007
metadata.source_slug: Phishing blijkt populaire vorm van cybercriminaliteit
metadata.source_title: Phishing proves a popular form of cybercrime

id: Phishing blijkt populaire vorm van cybercriminaliteit__c4-paragraph__0008
text: Artificial Intelligence (AI) further expands the attack options. By using deepfake technology, which creates images or audio that are indistinguishable from real, bad actors can make a victim believe they are dealing with someone else. In Hong Kong, a finance employee at a multinational transferred more than [25 million dollars](https://edition.cnn.com/2024/02/04/asia/deepfake-cfo-scam-hong-kong-intl-hnk/index.html) to fraudsters after joining a video meeting with a deepfake version of the CFO and other colleagues.

metadata.chunk_id: Phishing blijkt populaire vorm van cybercriminaliteit__c4-paragraph__0008
metadata.source_slug: Phishing blijkt populaire vorm van cybercriminaliteit
metadata.source_title: Phishing proves a popular form of cybercrime

id: Phishing blijkt populaire vorm van cybercriminaliteit__c4-paragraph__0009
text: In October last year, there was a similar attempt at Dutch online bank Bunq, when an employee was invited to a video call with what later turned out to be an AI clone of chief executive Ali Niknam. In a [LinkedIn post](https://www.linkedin.com/feed/update/urn:li:activity:7114874320627085312/), Niknam calls the clone “convincing”.

metadata.chunk_id: Phishing blijkt populaire vorm van cybercriminaliteit__c4-paragraph__0009
metadata.source_slug: Phishing blijkt populaire vorm van cybercriminaliteit
metadata.source_title: Phishing proves a popular form of cybercrime

id: Phishing blijkt populaire vorm van cybercriminaliteit__c4-paragraph__0010
text: [Also listen to the podcast: Generative AI: Telling the real from the fake](https://www.abnamro.nl/nl/zakelijk/insights/in-gesprek/podcast/de-innovatiegolf/generatieve-ai-het-verschil-tussen-echt-en-nep.html)

metadata.chunk_id: Phishing blijkt populaire vorm van cybercriminaliteit__c4-paragraph__0010
metadata.source_slug: Phishing blijkt populaire vorm van cybercriminaliteit
metadata.source_title: Phishing proves a popular form of cybercrime

id: Phishing blijkt populaire vorm van cybercriminaliteit__c4-paragraph__0011
text: Phishing is a popular way for bad actors to start a cyberattack, but it only causes damage if the recipient actually takes the bait. That is why attackers now often start their journey through the target’s IT landscape by simply logging in to one of the systems with a username and password. In 2023, almost one-third (30 per cent) of cyberattacks began this way, up from just 16 per cent in 2022, according to [IBM X-Force](https://www.ibm.com/reports/threat-intelligence). These login details can be bought ready-made, or guessed using brute computing power. It is an unobtrusive way to get in, which gives the intruder plenty of time to look for further vulnerabilities and information.

metadata.chunk_id: Phishing blijkt populaire vorm van cybercriminaliteit__c4-paragraph__0011
metadata.source_slug: Phishing blijkt populaire vorm van cybercriminaliteit
metadata.source_title: Phishing proves a popular form of cybercrime

id: Phishing blijkt populaire vorm van cybercriminaliteit__c4-paragraph__0012
text: Encouraging safe behaviour among employees is crucial to counter phishing. It is one of three steps entrepreneurs should take to protect themselves against cyberattacks. The first step is to carry out a risk analysis to map what is crucial to keep the company running and services operational. The second step is to take measures, such as promoting safe behaviour among employees, assigning ownership of specific data, and discussing cyber risks with partners and suppliers. Finally, it is essential to develop procedures to detect and handle cyber incidents.

metadata.chunk_id: Phishing blijkt populaire vorm van cybercriminaliteit__c4-paragraph__0012
metadata.source_slug: Phishing blijkt populaire vorm van cybercriminaliteit
metadata.source_title: Phishing proves a popular form of cybercrime

id: Phishing blijkt populaire vorm van cybercriminaliteit__c4-paragraph__0013
text: Last year, nearly three-quarters of Dutch companies faced a cyberattack. Read more about this in the article ‘A cyberattack does not always wake an entrepreneur up’.

id: Phishing blijkt populaire vorm van cybercriminaliteit__c4-paragraph__0015
text: Technology, Media & Telecom (TMT) is one of the fastest-growing sectors. Helped by the increasing use of software, algorithms and sensors, this sector underpins the digital renewal of other sectors.
